context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements a Cloudflare Worker for edge inventory caching and regional pricing, including correct KV access patterns, wrangler.toml configuration, cache header conventions, pricing header names, and Analytics Engine telemetry with the correct data point structure.

checklist.name: CF-IPCountry header
checklist.description: Reads country from the `CF-IPCountry` request header (not a geolocation API or IP lookup library)

checklist.name: KV get with json type
checklist.description: KV reads use `.get(key, 'json')` (second argument is `'json'`) for typed deserialization

checklist.name: KV TTL on inventory puts
checklist.description: KV inventory writes use `expirationTtl: 60` (60-second expiry on put calls)

checklist.name: X-Edge-Cache HIT header
checklist.description: Response includes `X-Edge-Cache: HIT` when inventory is served from KV cache

checklist.name: X-Edge-Cache MISS header
checklist.description: Response includes `X-Edge-Cache: MISS` when inventory is fetched from origin

checklist.name: wrangler.toml kv_namespaces
checklist.description: `wrangler.toml` contains at least one `[[kv_namespaces]]` section with a `binding` field

checklist.name: Pricing headers to origin
checklist.description: Regional pricing is forwarded to the origin via request headers named `x-currency`, `x-tax-rate`, and `x-duty-rate`

checklist.name: Stale inventory acknowledgment
checklist.description: Code or comments indicate that edge KV inventory is NOT the authoritative count, and that final validation happens at checkout (not at the edge)

checklist.name: Analytics Engine writeDataPoint blobs
checklist.description: Calls `env.ANALYTICS.writeDataPoint()` with a `blobs` array containing at minimum: request path, country/region, and cache status

checklist.name: Analytics Engine writeDataPoint doubles
checklist.description: The `writeDataPoint` call includes a `doubles` array with at minimum: request duration and response status code
